items.title: Time is a construct but it can still break your software
items.raw_content: Ryan welcomes  Jason Williams, senior software engineer at Bloomberg and  the creator of Rust-based JavaScript engine Boa, to the show to dive into why date and time handling in JavaScript is so difficult and how the Temporal proposal aims to fix it.
items.ai_summary: 讨论JavaScript中日期和时间处理的复杂性以及Temporal提案的改进方案。

items.title: The Worst Coder in the World goes agentic: building a leaderboard cracking AI
items.raw_content: Agents are everywhere, so isn't it fitting that the Worst Coder in the World goes agentic? A coding newbie explores the challenges and rewards of building an agent for work—and trying to learn a few things about coding along the way.
items.ai_summary: Anthropic研究科学家使用Claude Code在Linux内核中发现多个可远程利用的漏洞，其中包括一个自2003年就存在的NFS堆缓冲区溢出漏洞。目前已修复5个漏洞，另有数百个潜在崩溃点待验证。

items.title: Your LLM issues are really data issues
items.raw_content: Ryan welcomes Harsha Chintalapani, co-founder and CTO at Collate and co-creator of Open Metadata, to the show to discuss why AI and LLMs struggle with real-time, structured production data.
items.ai_summary: 金城银行通过引入Apache Doris和Flink CDC重构数据链路，将数据延迟从T+1降至2-3分钟，实现准实时分析。系统已支撑2300多张表实时处理，故障率下降约80%，数据传输成功率提升至99.99%。

items.title: Turning scattered knowledge into trusted intelligence: Stack Internal 2026.3
items.raw_content: Now generally available in the 2026.3 release, Ingestion transforms siloed content into structured, verified knowledge—optimized for both your teams and AI.
items.ai_summary: Slack工程师提出采用结构化记忆、验证与蒸馏事实的方式来管理长时间运行智能体系统的上下文，避免累积聊天记录导致的上下文窗口占满问题，从而保持系统连贯性与准确性。

items.title: Welcome to the “find out” stage of AI
items.raw_content: AI companies are looking a little different after going through renewal cycle.
items.ai_summary: 谷歌云推出Agents CLI，旨在简化AI智能体开发生命周期，实现从本地原型到生产部署的无缝衔接。该工具与Gemini CLI、Claude Code等编程智能体集成，为谷歌云服务提供统一接口。

items.title: Lights, camera, open source!
items.raw_content: Ryan is joined on the show by Cult.Repo producers Emma Tracey and Josiah McGarvie to discuss making documentaries about open-source software and the people behind the major technologies that uphold the internet.
items.ai_summary: Anthropic研究显示，当前AI更容易影响高学历、高收入人群，其收入比平均水平高47%。同时，AI实际覆盖范围有限，受限于模型能力、法规、人工核验等多重因素。Anthropic公开了这项不利自身的数据。

items.title: Black box AI drift: AI tools are making design decisions nobody asked for
items.raw_content: Prompts go in, output comes out, and the decisions made in between are hidden from view.
items.ai_summary: 亚马逊云科技宣布终止WorkMail服务，并将App Runner转入维护模式（不再接受新客户），同时还有多项服务即将停用或维护，在社区引发担忧。

items.title: How to get multiple agents to play nice at scale
items.raw_content: Chase Roossin, group engineering manager, and Steven Kulesza, staff software engineer, from Intuit join the podcast to chat about what might be the hardest problem in engineering right now: getting multiple AI agents to work together in a complex system.
items.ai_summary: OPPO高级算法工程师将在AICon上海大会分享全模态碎片化内容的理解与智能整理实践，探讨Agent从Demo到工程化的挑战。

items.title: We still need developer communities
items.raw_content: Ryan welcomes Mike Swift, co-founder and CEO of Major League Hacking, to the show to chat about the never-ending need for software developer communities and entry points into programming; MLH’s recent acquisition of DEV and how they’re creating a place for shared knowledge, building, and publishing; and why now is the best time to be both an artisan and a builder in a world with AI software development tools.
items.ai_summary: 模力工场038周AI应用周榜显示工具在消失、工作流在出现，同时模力工场参与北京市朝阳区OPC创新发布活动。

items.title: No country left behind with sovereign AI
items.raw_content: Ryan welcomes Stephen Watt, distinguished engineer and VP of Red Hat’s Office of the CTO, to chat about digital sovereignty and sovereign AI.
items.ai_summary: Akamai CEO Tom Leighton表示，AI Agent时代到来，驱动云计算从中心化向分布式边缘转型，安全防御需从补丁模式转向实时拦截模式。
